title: The Supplication for Thursday
fullText:
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

In the Name of ALLAH, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

أَلْحَمْدُ لِلّهِ الَّذِي

Praise belongs to ALLAH,

أَذْهَبَ اللَّيْلَ مُظْلِمَاً بِقُدْرَتِهِ،

who has taken away the shadowy night by His power

وَجآءَ بِالنَّهارِ مُبْصِراً بِرَحْمَتِهِ،

and brought the sight-giving day through His mercy.

وَكَسانِي ضِيآءَهُ وَآتانِي نِعْمَتَهُ.

He has clothed me in its brightness and given me its favour.

أَللَّهُمَّ فَكَما أَبْقَيْتَنِي لَهُ فَأَبْقِنِي لاَِمْثالِهِ،

O ALLAH, just as Thou hast spared me for this day, so also spare me for its likes,

وَصَلِّ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ،

bless the prophet MUHAMMAD and his Household,

وَلا تَفْجَعْنِي فِيهِ وَفِي غَيْرِهِ مِنَ اللَّيالِي وَالاَيَّامِ بِارْتِكابِ الْمَحارِمِ، وَاكْتِسابِ الْمَاثِمِ،

torment me not in it and in other nights and days by allowing me to commit unlawful acts and to clothe myself in sins;

وَارْزُقْنِي خَيْرَهُ، وَخَيْرَ ما فِيهِ، وَخَيْرَ ما بَعْدَهُ،

provide me with its good, the good of all within it, and the good of everything after it;

وَاصْرِفْ عَنِّي شَرَّهُ، وَشَرَّ ما فِيهِ، وَشَرَّ ما بَعْدَهُ.

and turn away from me its evil, the evil of all within it, and the evil of everything after it!.

أَللَّهُمَّ إنِّي

O ALLAH,

بِذِمَّةِ الاِسْلامِ أَتَوَسَّلُ إلَيْكَ،

by the protective compact of Islam, I seek mediation with Thee!

وَبِحُرْمَةِ الْقُرْآنِ أَعْتَمِدُ عَلَيْكَ،

by the inviolability of the Qur'an, I rely upon Thee!

وَبِمُحَمَّد الْمُصْطَفى صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وآلِهِ أَسْتَشْفِعُ لَدَيْكَ،

By MUHAMMAD the chosen (ALLAH bless him and his Household), I seek intercession with Thee

فَاعْرِفِ اللَّهُمَّ ذِمَّتِي الَّتِي رَجَوْتُ بِها قَضآءَ حاجَتِي،

So recognize my protective compact by which I hope my need will be granted,

يا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

O Most Merciful of the merciful!

أَللَّهُمَّ اقْضِ لِي فِي الخَمِيسِ خَمْساً

O ALLAH, decree for me on Thursday five things

لا يَتَّسِعُ لَها إلاَّ كَرَمُكَ

which none embraces but Thy generosity

وَلا يُطِيقُها إلاَّ نِعَمُكَ:

and none supports but Thy favours:

سَلامَةً أَقْوى بِها عَلَى طاعَتِكَ

health through which I may have the strength to obey Thee,

وَعِبادَةً أَسْتَحِقُّ بِها جَزِيلَ مَثُوبَتِكَ،

worship by which I may deserve Thy plentiful reward,

وَسَعَةً فِي الْحالِ مِنَ الرِّزْقِ الْحَلالِ،

plenty in my state through lawful provision,

وَأَنْ تُؤْمِنَنِي فِي مَواقِفِ الْخَوْفِ بِأَمْنِكَ،

that Thou makest me secure in the places of fear through Thy security,

وَتَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ طَوارِقِ الْهُمُومِ وَالْغُمُومِ فِي حِصْنِكَ،

and placest me in Thy fortress against the striking of worries and sorrows!

صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّد وَآلِهِ،

Bless MUHAMMAD and his Household,

وَاجْعَل تَوَسُّلِي بِهِ شافِعَاً يَوْمَ الْقِيامَةِ نافِعاً،

and make my seeking his mediation as an intercessor give profit on the Day of Resurrection!

إنَّكَ أَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ.

Surely Thou art the Most Merciful of the merciful!

By MUHAMMAD the chosen (ALLAH bless him and his Household), I seek intercession with Thee

translations.text: In the Name of ALLAH, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate
Praise belongs to ALLAH,
who has taken away the shadowy night by His power
and brought the sight-giving day through His mercy.
He has clothed me in its brightness and given me its favour.

pairs.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ فَكَما أَبْقَيْتَنِي لَهُ فَأَبْقِنِي لاَِمْثالِهِ،

translations.text: O ALLAH, just as Thou hast spared me for this day, so also spare me for its likes,
bless the prophet MUHAMMAD and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَلا تَفْجَعْنِي فِيهِ وَفِي غَيْرِهِ مِنَ اللَّيالِي وَالاَيَّامِ بِارْتِكابِ الْمَحارِمِ، وَاكْتِسابِ الْمَاثِمِ،

translations.text: torment me not in it and in other nights and days by allowing me to commit unlawful acts and to clothe myself in sins;

pairs.arabic: وَارْزُقْنِي خَيْرَهُ، وَخَيْرَ ما فِيهِ، وَخَيْرَ ما بَعْدَهُ،

translations.text: provide me with its good, the good of all within it, and the good of everything after it;

pairs.arabic: وَاصْرِفْ عَنِّي شَرَّهُ، وَشَرَّ ما فِيهِ، وَشَرَّ ما بَعْدَهُ.

translations.text: and turn away from me its evil, the evil of all within it, and the evil of everything after it!.
O ALLAH,
by the protective compact of Islam, I seek mediation with Thee!
by the inviolability of the Qur'an, I rely upon Thee!

pairs.arabic: وَبِمُحَمَّد الْمُصْطَفى صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وآلِهِ أَسْتَشْفِعُ لَدَيْكَ،

translations.text: By MUHAMMAD the chosen (ALLAH bless him and his Household), I seek intercession with Thee

pairs.arabic: فَاعْرِفِ اللَّهُمَّ ذِمَّتِي الَّتِي رَجَوْتُ بِها قَضآءَ حاجَتِي،

translations.text: So recognize my protective compact by which I hope my need will be granted,
O Most Merciful of the merciful!

pairs.arabic: أَللَّهُمَّ اقْضِ لِي فِي الخَمِيسِ خَمْساً

translations.text: O ALLAH, decree for me on Thursday five things
which none embraces but Thy generosity
and none supports but Thy favours:
health through which I may have the strength to obey Thee,
worship by which I may deserve Thy plentiful reward,

pairs.arabic: وَسَعَةً فِي الْحالِ مِنَ الرِّزْقِ الْحَلالِ،

translations.text: plenty in my state through lawful provision,

pairs.arabic: وَأَنْ تُؤْمِنَنِي فِي مَواقِفِ الْخَوْفِ بِأَمْنِكَ،

translations.text: that Thou makest me secure in the places of fear through Thy security,

pairs.arabic: وَتَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ طَوارِقِ الْهُمُومِ وَالْغُمُومِ فِي حِصْنِكَ،

translations.text: and placest me in Thy fortress against the striking of worries and sorrows!
Bless MUHAMMAD and his Household,

pairs.arabic: وَاجْعَل تَوَسُّلِي بِهِ شافِعَاً يَوْمَ الْقِيامَةِ نافِعاً،

translations.text: and make my seeking his mediation as an intercessor give profit on the Day of Resurrection!
Surely Thou art the Most Merciful of the merciful!
